title: Notification dated 24 July 1995
text: REGD. NO. D.L.—33004/95 The Gazette Of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 318] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, JULY 24, 1995/SRAVANA 2, 1917 1763 GI/95 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- THli GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF HUMAN RESOURCE DEVELOPMENT (Department of Women and Child Development) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th July, 1995 U.S.R. 562(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (c) of Sub-Section (1) of Section 21 of the Infant Milk Substitutes, Feeding Bottles and Infant Foods (Regulation of Production, Supply and Distribution) Act, 1992 (41 of 1992), the Central Government hereby authorises the following voluntary organisation engaged in the field of child welfare and development and child nutrition to make a complaint in writing under the said section, namely :— Breastfeeding Promotion Network of India (BPNI), BP-33, Pitampura, Dclhi-34. and for the said purpose makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Human Resource Development (Department of Women and Child Development) G.S.11. 540(E), dalcd the 27th June, 1994, namely:— In the said notification!, after serial No. 3 and the entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be added, namely :— i:4. Breastfeeding Promotion Network of India (BPNI), BP-33, Pitampura, Delhi-34." [F. No. 12-9|94-NT} B. SEN, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Oovt. of India Press, Ring Read, Maya Puri, New Delhi-110064- and Pnbllshed by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054, 1995 -- 2 of 2 --
